subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — I'd love to continue the conversation we started at the conference.

Here are some available slots for a meeting next week:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let me know which works best and I'll get a calendar invite sent your way.

As for your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to share internal contact information. You can find general contact details on our public website, and I'm happy to help coordinate introductions through the right channels after we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to catching up.

Best regards
